notes: [2026-04-30 round 2 audit] Pre-audit Gadi corpus: built with intel-compiler-llvm/2024.2 (icx + libiomp5), launched without OMP_PROC_BIND/OMP_PLACES, no numactl, no OMP_WAIT_POLICY override. The corrected gcc-built + libgomp + close/cores-pinned + numactl --localalloc + OMP_WAIT_POLICY=PASSIVE corpus lands under labels ending in _sr_gcc_pin.
archived_reason: pre-canonical Gadi run — not parity-matched with Setonix _smtoff_pin corpus. Issues: (1) ICX compiler (intel-compiler-llvm/2024.2, -xSAPPHIRERAPIDS) — uses Intel OpenMP runtime libiomp5 instead of libgomp, different vectorisation passes and auto-prefetch; (2) VTune hotspot collection co-running alongside IQ-TREE, adding 6-26%% wall overhead at high thread counts (32T: +6%%, 64T: +15%%, 104T: +26%%). Superseded by pending _sr_gcc_pin matrix (gcc/14.2.0, binutils/2.44, no VTune).
